stemHtml:
You have departed Brussels (EBBR) at 09:40Z to fly to Glasgow (EGPF). In the cruise at FL180 you receive the following message relating to an area the flight is expected to pass through:

“EGTT SIGMET 2 VALID 041000/041400 EGRR- EGTT LONDON FIR SEV MTW FCST WI N5300 W00130 - N5300 W00300 - N5500 W00200 FL070/200 STNR WKN”.

What hazard can be expected?

options.a: Severe mountain waves with downdrafts exceeding 600 ft per minute and/or severe turbulence within the area bounded by the coordinates.
options.b: Severe mountain waves at FL70 within the area bounded by the coordinates, with a westerly wind of 200 kt.
options.c: Cumulonimbus clouds producing moderate to severe icing and turbulence, and hail in the west of the area bounded by the coordinates until 14:00 UTC.
options.d: Severe mountain waves of 200 ft per minute vertical speed at FL70 within the area bounded by the coordinates.
